arts.ttl: What Ange Postecoglou did to the travelling Tottenham fans after their loss away to Bournemouth
Bournemouth 1-0 Tottenham: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Cherries move above Spurs in the Premier League
arts.sum: Bournemouth move above Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League table courtesy of a 1-0 win over Ange Postecoglou's side at the Vitality.

arts.ttl: Dean Huijsen heads Bournemouth to victory against Tottenham
arts.sum: Evanilson saw a second Cherries goal ruled out for offside.

arts.ttl: I saw £22m Tottenham player show Daniel Levy exactly why he deserves a new contract vs Bournemouth - opinion
arts.sum: He improved Tottenham after coming on! 👏

arts.ttl: I'm a Tottenham goal-scoring icon - I felt so hurt after joining Bournemouth
arts.sum: Even when I went back to Bournemouth I wasn't playing and when I think about it, that was one of the hardest times in my career," said Defoe on the Football Firsts podcast as he reflected back on that part of his career. "I just remember sitting there and thinking I'm going to phone my Mum and say to her; 'That's me done, I'm not playing anymore, I can't deal with it'.

arts.ttl: Tottenham team vs Bournemouth confirmed as Dominic Solanke and Archie Gray start, Son on bench
arts.sum: The Spurs boss rested the in-form Dejan Kulusevski from his line-up against Fulham and the Swede is back in the starting line-up with captain Son dropping to the bench. Ange Postecoglou has named his Tottenham side to take on Bournemouth in the Premier League on Thursday evening and captain Son Heung-min is on the bench.

arts.ttl: 'I would sell': Euro giants urged to let Aston Villa or Tottenham sign £29m misfit in January
arts.sum: The midfielder is up for sale...

arts.ttl: Bournemouth vs Tottenham - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Spurs look to leapfrog Aston Villa with win plus all the latest from Fulham vs Brighton
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest scores, team news and updates as Bournemouth host Tottenham and Fulham travel to Brighton in Premier League action.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham refuse to back down as Wolves fight to retain Matheus Cunha
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Tottenham refuse to back down as Wolves fight to retain Matheus Cunha FootballTransfers understands the club is eager to open contract negotiations with Cunha and make him the highest-paid player at Molineux.

arts.ttl: Tottenham drop early Pape Matar Sarr team news hint for Bournemouth clash
arts.sum: Tottenham play the final game of the midweek Premier League matchday as they take on Bournemouth at Vitality Stadium. Sarr featuring meanwhile, appears very likely with his running power and engine a huge asset Postecoglou could certainly do with against the Cherries .
